rationale: The cited 2011 JMKR paper is directly about how online ratings dynamics affect sales, while the 2025 eBay paper’s core question is the use of consumer reports versus administrative metrics in a reputation badge and their effects on buyer valuation/retention. Given this overlap in reputation/ratings mechanisms, the citation could plausibly serve as a theory or foundational empirical source rather than a purely incidental mention. With only DOI-level match evidence and no in-text snippet, it is not safe to drop as obvious mention-only.
